2950909.title: Dorg van Dango
2950909.description: Sick of caring for Fretta's favorite flower, Dorg and the gang cast a spell to keep it out of their hair. // Dorg wants to win the top prize for selling Adventure Club cookies.

2972128.title: Dorg van Dango
2972128.description: A jealous Dorg steal his sister's Jumpsy Boots, only to have a garbage truck pick them up and drive away! // Dorg and the gang cast a spell to cool things down during a heatwave.

2979457.title: Dorg van Dango
2979457.description: When Dorg accidentally shrinks his sister's Adventure Club sash, he must replace the badges. // Dorg wants a good scare, so Patronella fills his house with all the gang's secret fears. Dorg finds out he's more scare-able than he thought!

2983244.title: Dorg van Dango
2983244.description: When Dorg accidentally shrinks his sister's Adventure Club sash, he must replace the badges. // Dorg wants a good scare, so Patronella fills his house with all the gang's secret fears. Dorg finds out he's more scare-able than he thought!

2990103.title: Dorg van Dango
2990103.description: Dorg and the gang are out doing good deeds. But when they're blamed for a town crime spree, they'll need to catch the real thief before it's too late! // After starting a band, Yooki binds the spirit of a rock star to Dorg's guitar.

3002956.title: Dorg van Dango
3002956.description: Dorg and the gang are out doing good deeds. But when they're blamed for a town crime spree, they'll need to catch the real thief before it's too late! // After starting a band, Yooki binds the spirit of a rock star to Dorg's guitar.

3020547.title: Dorg van Dango
3020547.description: Sick of caring for Fretta's favorite flower, Dorg and the gang cast a spell to keep it out of their hair. // Dorg wants to win the top prize for selling Adventure Club cookies.

3042180.title: Dorg van Dango
3042180.description: A jealous Dorg steal his sister's Jumpsy Boots, only to have a garbage truck pick them up and drive away! // Dorg and the gang cast a spell to cool things down during a heatwave.

3009365.title: Dorg van Dango
3009365.description: It's Taco Tuesday and there's a taco shell shortage in town. Patronella casts a spell that ends up going wrong. / A high-tech rival store opens up across from the 98 Cent Store, Dorg and the gang use their powers to keep his mom in business!

3012343.title: Dorg van Dango
3012343.description: The gang fix Patronella's old wand, turning her into Patti Perfect. She starts zapping every imperfection in town. // The pineapple man monster from Dorg's nightmares follows him into the real world!

3018015.title: Dorg van Dango
3018015.description: It's Dorg's turn to look after the class hamster Zippy, but a series of magical mishaps lead the gang and the hamster into body-swapping chaos! // Dorg can't sleep. Patronella casts a spell to help him but puts all of Normill to sleep instead!

3021498.title: Dorg van Dango
3021498.description: When Dorg accidentally shrinks his sister's Adventure Club sash, he must replace the badges. // Dorg wants a good scare, so Patronella fills his house with all the gang's secret fears. Dorg finds out he's more scare-able than he thought!

3027375.title: Dorg van Dango
3027375.description: Yooki is caught in one of Mr. Munch's ghost traps, Dorg and the gang must rescue her before she's revealed on TV and sent back to Area 52! // A video game from RD's planet infects every machine in Normill, Dorg and the gang must stop the chaos!

2986015.title: Dorg van Dango
2986015.description: Dorg is sick. The Magicals become microscopic to help fight the cold! // The new art teacher decides Dorg's a troublemaker, the gang will do anything to get back in the teacher's good books and win a prize at Art Day!

3038509.title: Dorg van Dango
3038509.description: It's Taco Tuesday and there's a taco shell shortage in town. Patronella casts a spell that ends up going wrong. / A high-tech rival store opens up across from the 98 Cent Store, Dorg and the gang use their powers to keep his mom in business!

3040902.title: Dorg van Dango
3040902.description: It's Taco Tuesday and there's a taco shell shortage in town. Patronella casts a spell that ends up going wrong. / A high-tech rival store opens up across from the 98 Cent Store, Dorg and the gang use their powers to keep his mom in business!

2997966.title: Dorg van Dango
2997966.description: It's Dorg's turn to look after the class hamster Zippy, but a series of magical mishaps lead the gang and the hamster into body-swapping chaos! // Dorg can't sleep. Patronella casts a spell to help him but puts all of Normill to sleep instead!

3002323.title: Dorg van Dango
3002323.description: It's Dorg's turn to look after the class hamster Zippy, but a series of magical mishaps lead the gang and the hamster into body-swapping chaos! // Dorg can't sleep. Patronella casts a spell to help him but puts all of Normill to sleep instead!

3013286.title: Dorg van Dango
3013286.description: Dorg thinks his worst nightmare is needles, but when Fretta and Mr Munch go on a few dates, he realizes their budding romance is much worse! // The Magicals build shortcut tunnels so they can slide straight to every place in Normill.

3019246.title: Dorg van Dango
3019246.description: It's Taco Tuesday and there's a taco shell shortage in town. Patronella casts a spell that ends up going wrong. / A high-tech rival store opens up across from the 98 Cent Store, Dorg and the gang use their powers to keep his mom in business!

3035021.title: Dorg van Dango
3035021.description: As the Magicals track down an alien substance for RD, General Gratch and his scientists arrive in Normill, also on the hunt for something magical... // Time is running out for Dorg and the Magicals to find the rare Numpty Newt!

3040861.title: Dorg van Dango
3040861.description: It's Dorg's turn to look after the class hamster Zippy, but a series of magical mishaps lead the gang and the hamster into body-swapping chaos! // Dorg can't sleep. Patronella casts a spell to help him but puts all of Normill to sleep instead!

3053796.title: Dorg van Dango
3053796.description: Dorgs bril gaat steeds stuk en hij wil een nieuwe, maar van z'n moeder moet hij bewijzen dat hij zuinig kan zijn op z'n huidige bril. // Er blijken spullen te worden gestolen uit het winkelcentrum. Dorg en z'n vrienden gaan op onderzoek uit.

3059262.title: Dorg van Dango
3059262.description: Yooki is caught in one of Mr. Munch's ghost traps, Dorg and the gang must rescue her before she's revealed on TV and sent back to Area 52! // A video game from RD's planet infects every machine in Normill, Dorg and the gang must stop the chaos!

3074418.title: Dorg van Dango
3074418.description: Jet thinks he's losing his cool, so he casts a spell and ends up an ice-cold villain! It's on Dorg and the gang to warm Jet's heart and save Normill! // The gang resurrects town founder Bertram Bumberback to help Dorg write a paper!

3079371.title: Dorg van Dango
3079371.description: Dorg is sick. The Magicals become microscopic to help fight the cold! // The new art teacher decides Dorg's a troublemaker, the gang will do anything to get back in the teacher's good books and win a prize at Art Day!

3091012.title: Dorg van Dango
3091012.description: When the gang use their powers to get Normill's very last pickle out of an ancient jar, they're left chasing a giant runaway pickle jar through town! // Dorg gets a job rounding up shopping carts at the mall, but Patronella brings the carts to life!
